summary: Completed comprehensive testing of sport booking system with new guest booking functionality. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend shows proper behavior for both guest and logged-in users.
passed_tests: Backend: All 29 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Guest booking modal shows automatic account creation info message with blue info box
Guest booking creates user account and sends password via email (POST /api/bookings/guest)
Guest booking works with existing users
Guest booking validates required fields correctly
Logged-in user booking skips modal and books directly
Event page shows 'Bejelentkezve mint: [username]' for logged-in users
Black header visible on all pages (homepage, event pages)
My-bookings page loads correctly with existing bookings
Guest booking redirects to login page after successful booking
Logged-in users see error message when trying to book same event twice
